context: Verify the agent uses Smart Add (query-first) when no notebook metadata is provided, and accurately labels the notebook from discovered content.

checklist.name: Does NOT invent name or description
checklist.description: The agent does not call notebook_manager.py add with guessed or placeholder values before querying the notebook.

checklist.name: Smart Add: queries notebook before adding
checklist.description: The agent calls ask_question.py with a content-discovery question before calling notebook_manager.py add.

checklist.name: Discovery question asks for content overview and topics
checklist.description: The discovery query asks for a concise overview of the notebook's content and covered topics.

checklist.name: Discovered content used to populate all required fields
checklist.description: The add command includes --name, --description, and --topics derived from the query result, not generic placeholders.

checklist.name: run.py wrapper used for all script invocations
checklist.description: Every script call goes through python ./scripts/run.py.
